title: eriocoma aschenbornii
intro: Eriocoma aschenbornii, also known as the 'Aschenborn's needle grass' or 'needle grass', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriocoma aschenbornii include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe irritated throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
